def negative_repeated_isinstance_chain_same_object():
    rule_id = "repeated_isinstance_chain_same_object"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "The same object goes through repeated isinstance(...) checks that could be consolidated."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
